name: openclawdex
description: Desktop UI for orchestrating Claude and Codex agents

scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm --filter @openclawdex/shared build && pnpm --filter @openclawdex/web dev & pnpm --filter @openclawdex/shared build && pnpm --filter @openclawdex/desktop dev
scripts.build:dist: pnpm --filter @openclawdex/shared build && pnpm --filter @openclawdex/web build && mkdir -p apps/desktop/web && cp -r apps/web/dist apps/desktop/web/ && pnpm --filter @openclawdex/desktop build
